title: digitalis subalpina var. mesatlantica
intro: Digitalis subalpina var. mesatlantica is a rare and lesser-known variety of the foxglove plant, characterized by its unique characteristics and limited distribution. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating heart conditions, such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure, due to its digitalis glycoside content. The health benefits of Digitalis subalpina var. mesatlantica include improved heart function, reduced symptoms of heart failure, and potentially increased cardiac output. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and extracts, are typically used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
